page: Amazon Web Services r8in.32xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by Intel processors, delivering 128 virtual CPUs across 64 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core. The dedicated CPU allocation operates at a speed of 3.9 GHz.

The instance is configured with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached Elastic Block Store volumes. There are no integrated GPUs on this instance.

For network-heavy operations, the r8in.32xlarge offers a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps. This high-throughput network capacity, combined with the large memory footprint, makes the instance suitable for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and network-optimized data processing tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services r8in.32xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by Intel processors on an x86_64 architecture, it provides 128 dedicated vCPUs across 64 physical cores running at 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, translating to 8.0 GB of memory per core, and operates on the Nitro hypervisor. This instance does not feature local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps, making it highly optimized for network and EBS performance. The r8in.32xlarge is suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive applications, and high-throughput data processing tasks.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8in.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and 200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, designed for large-scale databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8in.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: A memory-optimized, high-bandwidth virtual server featuring one terabyte of RAM and dedicated Intel processors for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores powered by Intel processors at 3.9 GHz
1024.0 GB of system memory optimized for large-scale databases
200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Built on the Nitro hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation
No local storage or GPUs, requiring network-attached storage solutions
